ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist is associated with */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Birth place of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the genre's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the song is explicit or not */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_albums" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist's image */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is public or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness score of the song */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "played_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was played */,
  "playcount" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has played the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended song */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was recommended */,
  "recommended_reason" TEXT /* Reason why the song was recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "song_id")
)
column_names: ID of the genre the artist is associated with
ID of the artist who created the song
Duration of the song in milliseconds
Whether the song is explicit or not
ID of the artist who created the album
Track number of the song in the album
ID of the user who created the playlist
Whether the playlist is public or not
Date and time the song was added to the playlist
ID of the user who added the song to the playlist
Date and time the song was played
Number of times the user has played the song
Date and time the song was recommended
Reason why the song was recommended
